evals.prompt: Go ahead and apply to the jobs that are waiting in my tracker
evals.expected_output: Agent triggers the ai-apply skill, checks Playwright, loads preferences and site-difficulty.json, fetches needs_apply jobs from Supabase, and begins the per-job apply workflow

evals.prompt: I added 3 new jobs to my tracker with status needs_apply. Can you apply to them for me?
evals.expected_output: Agent invokes ai-apply skill, fetches those 3 jobs, attempts to apply using browser automation, asks for salary interactively, and updates statuses in Supabase based on results

evals.prompt: Run the AI apply batch — I want to see which jobs it manages to apply to and which ones fail
evals.expected_output: Agent runs ai-apply skill for a full batch, produces a summary.md in apply-runs/, prints terminal summary with applied/failed/skipped counts
